stories.headline: Britney Spears Keeps Low Profile During Holiday Weekend Outing - TMZ
stories.summary: Britney Spears kept things low-key ahead of the Fourth of July holiday weekend, stepping out for a drive in Los Angeles with her bodyguard.

stories.headline: ‘A Capitol Fourth Concert’ rehearsal closed to public because of heat - The Washington Post
stories.summary: A decision will be made Friday morning about whether the “A Capitol Fourth Concert,” held on the West Lawn of the U.S Capitol, will take place as planned, according to a Capitol Police statement.

stories.headline: Midjourney Seeks to Reveal Studios’ Use of AI in High-Stakes Copyright Battle - Variety
stories.summary: Midjourney is appealing a magistrate judge's order limiting its ability to reveal how studios are using artificial intelligence.

stories.headline: America Has Two Options at the Box Office This Fourth of July Weekend. The Choice Is Clear. - Slate Magazine
stories.summary: Two new movies promise to tell a tale of the history of the United States. Only one truly captures it.
